brief_summary: Left: clock face with teal hands marking the 90-minute setup, labelled 'real prose · not exercises'. Right: three teal-bordered cards listing the three things to notice — forearm condition, right pinky behavior, and the want-to-continue at minute 91. Caption: 'WPM is irrelevant · finishing-feel is everything'.
data_sources: typing-tests-lie.mdx § 'What to optimize for instead' — 'Type real prose for ninety minutes ... Then notice three things. Notice the forearm. Notice the right pinky. Notice whether the typist wants to keep going at minute ninety-one or wants to stop. That is the test. WPM is irrelevant; finishing-feel is everything.'
